## Content Assessment of Key Elements

| **Key Elements** | **Recording matches** | **Score** |
|-----------------|-----------------------|-----------|
| - **Thank you** | ✅ Yes | 100% |
| - my responsibility \| **help Members achieve** \| **financial goals** \| make \| banking \| convenient | ⚠️ Partially | 33% |
| - Circumstances \| change over time \| implementing \| way \| **understand** \| **current** \| **future financial needs** \| look \| all \| ways \| **be helpful** | ⚠️ Partially | 36% |
| - helped others save time \| money \| ask \| few questions \| **see** \| do \| same for you. | ⚠️ Partially | 14% |
| - **about 10-15 minutes** | ✅ Yes | 100% |
| - **complimentary service** \| course \| **confidential** | ⚠️ Partially | 66% |
| - **get started** \| **now** | ✅ Yes | 100% |*only bolded keywords are mentioned during the recording

## Style Coaching Recommendations

* Rhythm & Timing: Try to smooth out the transition when you pause after '10, 15 minutes' to keep the momentum of your pitch more consistent.
* Volume and Tone: Enhance your tonal variety when mentioning 'complimentary service' to sound more inviting and highlight the special value you are offering.
* Emotional Authenticity: Show more facial animation when discussing the 'future' to demonstrate a sincere interest in the long-term well-being of the client.
* Confidence: Speak with more certainty when saying 'very confidential' to reassure the client and build immediate trust in the security of the process.
